## Architecture Summary
- COBOL record layouts -> Python @dataclass with from_line()/to_line() (fixed-width 80-byte)
- PIC S9(n)Vnn COMP-3 -> decimal.Decimal (NEVER float)
- PIC 9(n) -> int, PIC X(n) -> str (fixed-width pad/truncate)
- READ AT END -> generator (read_records()), OPEN OUTPUT+WRITE -> SequentialFileWriter
- PERFORM THRU -> merged range (EXIT paras are no-ops)
- LINKAGE SECTION -> function parameters
- JCL DD -> env vars, DD concatenation -> colon-separated paths + cat merge
- JCL compile_link (LEMA01A-P) -> SKIP
- CALL subprogram USING -> direct function import and call
- VSAM KSDS -> dict-based key-value store
